# Search Graph

Search graph summary for scale ranking tests.

## Claims

- [current] Search graph ranking combines text matches with related page proximity. Sources: [Architecture](./architecture.md), file:src/wiki/search-index.ts, command:npm run check

The search graph page mentions ranking, graph proximity, omitted pages, and context budgets. It links back to [Architecture](./architecture.md) and out to the [Claims Ledger](./claims-ledger.md).
